description: Canonical environment variables for the Archon Prime VS Code execution environment. All tooling must resolve paths through these variables. No module may use hardcoded absolute paths.

AP_ROOT.description: Absolute path to the ARCHON_PRIME repository root. Sole manually-configured anchor. All other variables derive from this.

AP_SYSTEM_CONFIG.description: Absolute path to the SYSTEM meta-configuration layer.

AP_WORKFLOW_ROOT.description: Absolute path to the workflow mutation tooling root. Contains all pipeline execution modules.

AP_EXECUTION_ENVELOPES.description: Absolute path to the active execution envelope directory. Must contain a valid ENVELOPE_MANIFEST.json before execution.

AP_REPORTS.description: Absolute path to the runtime report output root. All pipeline execution reports must be written here.

AP_TOOLING_ROOT.description: Absolute path to the workflow mutation tooling module tree. Equivalent to AP_WORKFLOW_ROOT; explicit alias for module-level path resolution.

resolution_rules: AP_ROOT must be set explicitly before any other variable is derived.
All other variables must expand AP_ROOT before use.
Variables must be available to all subprocess invocations.
No tooling module may substitute hardcoded paths for these variables.
